expectations.text: The output is saved to outputs/generated/prd.json.
branchName is derived from the feature title.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Workspace Member Management",
  "branchName": "workspace-member-management",
  "description": "Enable admin membership management operations.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add member invite by email",
      "description": "As an admin, I want invite members by email so access can be granted quickly.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Invite flow validates email and creates membership invite.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/actions/inviteWorkspaceMember.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add role change action",
      "description": "As an admin, I want change member role between viewer, editor, and admin so permissions stay correct.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Role updates persist new role for member.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/actions/changeWorkspaceMemberRole.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Add revoke workspace access action",
      "description": "As an admin, I want revoke workspace access so users can be removed.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Revoke action removes or disables membership.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/actions/revokeWorkspaceMember.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Record and view membership audit changes",
      "description": "As an admin, I want audit visibility for membership changes so compliance checks stay possible.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Membership changes are written to audit log.",
        "Workspace settings page shows recent membership changes.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/services/workspaceMembershipAudit.ts",
        "src/ui/settings/WorkspaceMembershipAuditPanel.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover invite, role change, revoke access, and audit-log or audit-view work.

expectations.text: Dependencies point backward, batches are dense, and at least one batch contains parallel-safe stories.
